name: 終極身份揭露（父親現身）
description: 塔格利安公爵親臨婚禮，所有人終於知道被嘲笑了全劇的「外送員」就是塔格利安家族千金。冒牌千金的謊言同時被拆穿。這是全劇最高潮的爽點——雙重揭露（真千金確認+假千金被揭穿）帶來雙倍滿足感。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: This is the great Lady Targaryen. How dare you try to kill her? / You are Lady Targaryen? No way. / So, you're a Targaryen? / I only told you like a million times. You didn't believe me.
